title: The Lonely Road and the Lost Woman

scenes.text: A woman's last known steps fade into the wilderness.
It happened in Yosemite National Park, California.
In 1996, 35-year-old Joie Armstrong vanished while hiking, leaving no clues behind.
Search efforts have continued over the years, but Joie's case remains open.
Despite ongoing investigations, Joie's fate is still unknown.
scenes.label: UNSOLVED MYSTERY

scenes.text: Follow if you'd have cracked this one.

description: 📍 Yosemite National Park, USA - 1996. A hiker named Joie Armstrong disappears in the wilderness, her last steps vanishing into thin air. Follow for daily cold cases!
